programs.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programs.desc: PSA Flight #182 collides with a Cessna and both planes crash into a quiet residential neighborhood below.

programs.title: Mayday : Air Disaster
programs.desc: The crew loses control of the aircraft and it crashes moments later. 273 people are killed.

programs.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programs.desc: Asiana Flight 214 slams into a seawall just short of the runway in San Francisco.

programs.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programs.desc: United Airlines Flight #232 is crippled when one of its three engines explodes.

programs.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programs.desc: The crew of a UPS cargo jet is faced with a life-threatening emergency as their cockpit fills with smoke.

programs.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programs.desc: The pilots of Northwest Airlines Flight #85 barely get their crippled 747 to Alaska for an emergency landing.
